physical_schema.description: UTC calendar day for the metric observation.
physical_schema.name: day_utc

physical_schema.description: Metric value for the (day_utc, metric) pair.
physical_schema.name: value

semantic_classes.description: Benchmark class path metrics such as DCA cohort ladders.
semantic_classes.name: benchmark_class_metrics

semantic_classes.description: Block production, size, interval, weight, and fullness aggregates.
semantic_classes.name: block_aggregates

semantic_classes.description: Standalone market, valuation, supply, and realized-value metric families.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Known standalone prefixes such as price, realized, investor, cost, invested, subsidy, supply, market, sopr, mvrv, and similar domains.
semantic_classes.name: core_market_metrics

semantic_classes.description: Halving-epoch cohort metrics partitioned by epoch id.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Top-level prefix is epoch with epoch_<n>_* metric patterns.
semantic_classes.name: halving_epoch_cohorts

semantic_classes.description: Short-term and long-term holder cohort metrics.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Top-level prefix is sth or lth.
semantic_classes.name: holder_cohorts

semantic_classes.description: Per-pool mining production, dominance, fee, coinbase, and subsidy metrics.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Exact top-level family exposes the mining-pool signature (blocks_mined, dominance, coinbase, fee, subsidy).
semantic_classes.name: mining_pool_metrics

semantic_classes.description: Fallback class for documented families that do not match a more specific rule.
semantic_classes.name: other_standalone_metrics

semantic_classes.description: Script type and output-type cohort metrics.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Top-level prefix starts with p2 or is unknown, empty, or opreturn.
semantic_classes.name: script_output_type_cohorts

semantic_classes.description: Vintage cohort metrics partitioned by originating year.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Top-level prefix is year with year_<yyyy>_* metric patterns.
semantic_classes.name: vintage_year_cohorts

semantic_classes.description: Duration-led rolling return, DCA, lump-sum, and path-statistic metrics.
semantic_classes.matching_rule: Top-level prefix matches a duration token such as 1m, 1y, or 10y.
semantic_classes.name: windowed_return_and_path_metrics
